title: Megacarpaea megalocarpa
taxonomy: Megacarpaea megalocarpa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Megacarpaea and is native to the Himalayas. The plant is a perennial species and is known for its large flowers and distinctive characteristics. Megacarpaea megalocarpa is often found growing in high-altitude regions and is a rare species. Further studies are needed to fully understand its classification and relationship to other plants within the Brassicaceae family.
uses: Megacarpaea megalocarpa is reported to be used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region.
